title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor reports that PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI-assisted development tools. High-adoption teams at PayPal completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade six times faster than baseline.
